title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: Design and build scalable microservices powering our B2B SaaS platform. You will own backend architecture decisions, lead code reviews, and mentor junior engineers. Our APIs serve 10M+ requests per day across three AWS regions.
requirements: 5+ years backend development experience
Proficiency in Python or Go
Experience with distributed systems and microservices
Familiarity with AWS or GCP cloud infrastructure
Strong understanding of REST and gRPC APIs
preferred: Experience with Kubernetes and Docker
Background in B2B SaaS products
Familiarity with observability tools such as Datadog or Grafana

title: ML Engineer
description: Build and deploy machine learning models into production. You will collaborate with data scientists to take models from notebook to scalable inference pipelines serving real-time predictions for our enterprise customers.
requirements: 3+ years of ML engineering or MLOps experience
Strong Python skills including PyTorch or TensorFlow
Experience deploying models via REST APIs or batch pipelines
Familiarity with feature stores and model registries
Experience with cloud platforms (AWS SageMaker, GCP Vertex AI, or Azure ML)
preferred: Experience with LLMs or transformer-based models
MLflow or Weights and Biases for experiment tracking
Kubernetes-based model serving

title: Product Manager, Core Platform
description: Define and drive the product roadmap for our core B2B SaaS platform. Partner closely with engineering, design, and customers to ship features that drive retention and expansion revenue.
requirements: 3+ years B2B SaaS product management experience
Strong data analysis and hypothesis-driven decision making
Experience with agile delivery and sprint planning
Excellent written and verbal communication skills
Track record of launching features with measurable business outcomes
preferred: Technical background or CS degree
Familiarity with CRM or ATS tools
Experience with pricing and packaging decisions

title: Data Engineer
description: Build and maintain robust data pipelines that move, transform, and serve data across our enterprise data platform. You will work closely with analytics, data science, and product engineering to ensure reliable data availability.
requirements: 4+ years data engineering experience
Proficiency in SQL and Python
Experience with Apache Spark or dbt
Familiarity with cloud data warehouses such as Snowflake, BigQuery, or Redshift
Understanding of data modeling and ETL/ELT design patterns
preferred: Experience with Apache Kafka or real-time streaming
Airflow or Dagster for pipeline orchestration
Data quality frameworks such as Great Expectations

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Own the infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and reliability engineering for our SaaS platform. You will drive automation, reduce toil, and ensure 99.9% uptime for our enterprise customers.
requirements: 4+ years DevOps or Site Reliability Engineering experience
Strong Kubernetes and Docker experience
Infrastructure as code with Terraform or Pulumi
Experience with CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, CircleCI, or Jenkins)
Proficiency in at least one scripting language (Python or Bash)
preferred: AWS or GCP certifications
Observability tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, or Datadog
On-call rotation experience with incident management

title: Frontend Engineer
description: Build fast, accessible, and delightful user interfaces for our B2B SaaS product used by 50,000+ daily users. You will collaborate with design and product to translate complex workflows into intuitive experiences.
requirements: 4+ years frontend engineering experience
Expert-level React and TypeScript skills
Experience with state management (Redux, Zustand, or React Query)
Strong understanding of web performance optimization
Familiarity with design systems and component libraries
preferred: Experience with Next.js or Vite
Accessibility (WCAG 2.1) implementation experience
Experience with Figma-to-code workflows

title: Data Scientist
description: Develop predictive models and statistical analyses that power customer-facing analytics and internal decision-making. You will work across the full data lifecycle from raw ingestion to production deployment and monitoring.
requirements: 3+ years data science experience in a production environment
Strong Python skills with scikit-learn or PyTorch
Solid SQL and data wrangling capabilities
Experience communicating model results to non-technical stakeholders
Familiarity with A/B testing and experimentation frameworks
preferred: NLP or LLM fine-tuning experience
MLflow or similar experiment tracking tools
Experience with causal inference or uplift modeling

title: Security Engineer
description: Design and implement security controls across our cloud-native SaaS platform. You will lead security reviews, conduct threat modeling, and partner with engineering to embed security practices into the SDLC.
requirements: 4+ years application or cloud security engineering experience
Familiarity with OWASP Top 10 and secure coding practices
Experience with cloud security controls (AWS IAM, VPC, GuardDuty or equivalents)
Knowledge of SOC 2, ISO 27001, or similar compliance frameworks
Experience with penetration testing or red team exercises
preferred: CISSP, CEH, or AWS Security Specialty certification
Experience with SIEM and threat detection platforms
Familiarity with zero-trust architecture

title: Customer Success Manager
description: Own post-sale relationships with a portfolio of mid-market SaaS customers. You will drive onboarding, adoption, and renewal, acting as the voice of the customer internally and a trusted advisor externally.
requirements: 3+ years customer success or account management in B2B SaaS
Proven track record of hitting net revenue retention targets
Strong project management and organization skills
Experience with Salesforce or Gainsight
Excellent presentation and executive communication skills
preferred: Technical aptitude to understand API-based products
Experience with QBR (Quarterly Business Review) facilitation
Background in HR tech, recruiting, or talent platforms

title: Recruiting Operations Analyst
description: Support the talent acquisition team by managing ATS data, reporting on recruiting metrics, and improving sourcing and screening workflows. You will be the operational backbone that helps our recruiters work faster and smarter.
requirements: 2+ years recruiting operations, HR analytics, or talent acquisition experience
Proficiency with ATS platforms such as Greenhouse, Lever, or Ashby
Strong Excel or Google Sheets skills for reporting and analysis
Attention to detail and ability to manage multiple open requisitions
Experience with HRIS systems and data hygiene
preferred: Familiarity with SQL or basic data querying
Experience building recruiter dashboards or BI reports
Knowledge of EEOC compliance and fair hiring practices
